destinations.evidence: Receipt construction extracts the async settlement fields and uses try_into().ok() so amount overflow becomes None.
The dependency envelope exposes the async settlement variant used by the port receipt extractor.
destinations.snippet:
AsyncSettlement(Signed<TxAsyncSettlement>)

pub const fn as_async_settlement(&self) -> Option<&Signed<TxAsyncSettlement>> { match self { Self::AsyncSettlement(tx) => Some(tx), _ => None } }

destinations.evidence: The EVM receipt builder wraps async settlement transactions in the AsyncSettlement receipt envelope variant.

equivalence_argument: Async settlement transaction variant support is owned by alloy dependencies, while the port RPC receipt layer populates the user-facing fields. Together they preserve variant identity and field exposure with overflow-to-None amount handling.
notes: Mapped in port with alloy dependency support.
rationale: The diff adds as_async_settlement to the signed transaction trait and TransactionSigned implementation, extracts settlement fields into receipt metadata, and maps TxType::AsyncSettlement to ReceiptEnvelope::AsyncSettlement. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For AsyncSettlement transactions, receipt construction extracts async_tx_hash, user address, total amount, executor address, executor fee, commitment validator, commitment fee, inclusion validator, inclusion fee, and settlement block into receipt fields, using None for amounts that overflow u128.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create an AsyncSettlement transaction with distinctive settlement fields, build a receipt, and assert each field is populated. Use a fee value exceeding u128 and assert the corresponding optional receipt amount is None. Assert the receipt envelope variant is AsyncSettlement.
summary: AsyncSettlement receipts expose settlement fields and preserve the envelope variant.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create an AsyncSettlement transaction with distinctive fields and oversized fee values, build a receipt, and assert fields are present and overflowing amounts are None with an AsyncSettlement envelope.
title: AsyncSettlement receipt fields are exposed
